<!DOCTYPE html>

<html lang="it">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8"/>
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0"/>
<title>Al City — Ristorante · Biliardo · Sport</title>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Playfair+Display:ital,wght@0,400;0,700;1,400;1,700&family=DM+Sans:wght@300;400;500&display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/>
<style>
*{margin:0;padding:0;box-sizing:border-box}
html{scroll-behavior:smooth}
:root{
  --bg:#faf8f4;--bg2:#f3efe7;--ink:#1c1814;--brown:#5c4a32;
  --mid:#9a8870;--light:#ddd4c0;--border:#e8e0d0;
  --gold:#c8952a;--red:#cc2020;--white:#ffffff;
}
body{background:var(--bg);color:var(--ink);font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;overflow-x:hidden;}
body::before{content:'';position:fixed;inset:0;background-image:url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg viewBox='0 0 400 400' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cfilter id='n'%3E%3CfeTurbulence type='fractalNoise' baseFrequency='.65' numOctaves='4' stitchTiles='stitch'/%3E%3C/filter%3E%3Crect width='100%25' height='100%25' filter='url(%23n)' opacity='.025'/%3E%3C/svg%3E");pointer-events:none;z-index:8999;}

/* NAV */
nav{position:fixed;top:0;left:0;right:0;z-index:500;height:70px;padding:0 40px;display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;background:rgba(250,248,244,.96);backdrop-filter:blur(12px);border-bottom:1px solid var(–border);}
.n-logo{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;text-decoration:none;}
.n-logo img{width:44px;height:44px;object-fit:contain;}
.n-logo-text{font-family:‘Playfair Display’,serif;font-size:1.1rem;font-style:italic;color:var(–ink);}
.n-links{display:flex;gap:28px;}
.n-link{font-size:.62rem;font-weight:400;letter-spacing:.14em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(–mid);text-decoration:none;transition:color .2s;}
.n-link:hover{color:var(–ink);}
.n-cta{font-size:.62rem;font-weight:500;letter-spacing:.14em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(–white);background:var(–ink);padding:10px 22px;text-decoration:none;transition:background .2s;}
.n-cta:hover{background:var(–brown);}
@media(max-width:700px){.n-links{display:none;}}

/* HERO */
#hero{min-height:100vh;padding-top:70px;display:flex;align-items:center;position:relative;overflow:hidden;background:var(–ink);}
#hero::before{content:’’;position:absolute;inset:0;background:radial-gradient(ellipse at 20% 60%,rgba(200,149,42,.07) 0%,transparent 55%),radial-gradient(ellipse at 80% 20%,rgba(200,149,42,.04) 0%,transparent 45%);}
#hero::after{content:’’;position:absolute;inset:0;background-image:repeating-linear-gradient(-45deg,transparent,transparent 40px,rgba(255,255,255,.01) 40px,rgba(255,255,255,.01) 41px);}
.hero-content{position:relative;z-index:1;display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;width:100%;min-height:calc(100vh - 70px);}
.hero-left{display:flex;flex-direction:column;justify-content:center;padding:80px 60px;border-right:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.06);}
.h-eyebrow{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;font-size:.58rem;font-weight:500;letter-spacing:.2em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(–gold);margin-bottom:24px;opacity:0;animation:up .5s .2s forwards;}
.h-eyebrow::before{content:’’;width:20px;height:1px;background:var(–gold);}
.h-title{font-family:‘Playfair Display’,serif;font-size:clamp(3.5rem,7vw,6.5rem);font-weight:700;line-height:.92;color:var(–white);opacity:0;animation:up .8s .4s forwards;}
.h-title em{font-style:italic;font-weight:400;color:var(–gold);display:block;}
.h-tagline{font-size:.88rem;font-weight:300;color:rgba(255,255,255,.4);line-height:1.75;margin-top:24px;max-width:340px;opacity:0;animation:up .6s .6s forwards;}
.h-tagline strong{color:rgba(255,255,255,.7);font-weight:400;}
.h-pills{display:flex;gap:8px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-top:28px;opacity:0;animation:up .5s .8s forwards;}
.pill{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;font-size:.6rem;font-weight:400;letter-spacing:.1em;text-transform:uppercase;color:rgba(255,255,255,.35);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.1);padding:7px 14px;}
.h-btn{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;margin-top:36px;font-size:.7rem;font-weight:500;letter-spacing:.14em;text-transform:uppercase;background:var(–gold);color:var(–ink);padding:14px 30px;text-decoration:none;box-shadow:0 8px 32px rgba(200,149,42,.25);transition:background .2s,transform .2s;opacity:0;animation:up .5s 1s forwards;}
.h-btn:hover{background:#a87824;transform:translateY(-2px);}
.hero-right{display:flex;flex-direction:column;justify-content:center;align-items:center;padding:80px 60px;position:relative;}
.hero-right::before{content:’’;position:absolute;width:320px;height:320px;border-radius:50%;border:1px solid rgba(200,149,42,.1);top:50%;left:50%;transform:translate(-50%,-50%);}
.logo-wrap{position:relative;opacity:0;animation:fadeIn .9s .5s forwards;}
.logo-wrap img{width:min(300px,75%);filter:drop-shadow(0 20px 60px rgba(200,149,42,.2));}
.logo-ring{position:absolute;inset:-24px;border-radius:50%;border:1px solid rgba(200,149,42,.12);animation:spin 22s linear infinite;}
@keyframes spin{from{transform:rotate(0deg)}to{transform:rotate(360deg)}}
.hero-stats{display:flex;gap:0;margin-top:36px;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.08);border-radius:2px;overflow:hidden;opacity:0;animation:up .6s .9s forwards;}
.hs{padding:14px 22px;text-align:center;border-right:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.08);}
.hs:last-child{border-right:none;}
.hs-n{font-family:‘Playfair Display’,serif;font-size:1.4rem;font-style:italic;color:var(–gold);line-height:1;}
.hs-l{font-size:.52rem;font-weight:400;letter-spacing:.12em;text-transform:uppercase;color:rgba(255,255,255,.2);margin-top:4px;}
@media(max-width:760px){.hero-content{grid-template-columns:1fr;}.hero-left{padding:52px 28px;}.hero-right{padding:40px 28px;border-right:none;border-top:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.06);}.logo-wrap img{width:180px;}}

/* STRIP */
.strip{overflow:hidden;padding:13px 0;background:var(–gold);}
.strip-track{display:inline-flex;white-space:nowrap;animation:tk 16s linear infinite;}
.sw{font-family:‘Playfair Display’,serif;font-style:italic;font-size:.88rem;color:rgba(28,24,20,.45);padding:0 26px;}
.ss{color:rgba(28,24,20,.25);font-size:.55rem;}
@keyframes tk{from{transform:translateX(0)}to{transform:translateX(-50%)}}

/* MENU */
#menu{padding:100px 40px;background:var(–bg);}
.menu-inner{max-width:1000px;margin:0 auto;}
.menu-header{text-align:center;margin-bottom:48px;}
.menu-eyebrow{font-size:.58rem;font-weight:500;letter-spacing:.22em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(–gold);margin-bottom:10px;}
.menu-title{font-family:‘Playfair Display’,serif;font-size:clamp(2rem,5vw,3.5rem);font-weight:700;color:var(–ink);}
.menu-title em{font-style:italic;font-weight:400;}
.menu-sub{font-size:.85rem;font-weight:300;color:var(–mid);margin-top:8px;}

/* TABS */
.tabs{display:flex;gap:0;border:1px solid var(–border);overflow:hidden;margin-bottom:40px;flex-wrap:wrap;}
.tab{flex:1;min-width:100px;padding:13px 16px;font-size:.6rem;font-weight:500;letter-spacing:.1em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(–mid);background:var(–white);border:none;cursor:pointer;border-right:1px solid var(–border);transition:background .2s,color .2s;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:6px;}
.tab:last-child{border-right:none;}
.tab:hover{background:var(–bg2);color:var(–ink);}
.tab.active{background:var(–ink);color:var(–white);}

/* PANELS */
.panel{display:none;}
.panel.active{display:block;}
.menu-section{margin-bottom:36px;}
.section-label{font-family:‘Playfair Display’,serif;font-size:1.1rem;font-style:italic;color:var(–gold);margin-bottom:12px;padding-bottom:8px;border-bottom:1px solid var(–border);}
.menu-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:1px;background:var(–border);border:1px solid var(–border);}
@media(max-width:600px){.menu-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}}
.mi{background:var(–white);padding:18px 22px;display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:flex-start;gap:14px;transition:background .2s;}
.mi:hover{background:var(–bg2);}
.mi-name{font-size:.9rem;font-weight:500;color:var(–ink);margin-bottom:3px;}
.mi-desc{font-size:.72rem;font-weight:300;color:var(–mid);line-height:1.4;}
.mi-badge{font-size:.52rem;font-weight:500;letter-spacing:.08em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(–gold);border:1px solid rgba(200,149,42,.3);padding:2px 7px;display:inline-block;margin-top:5px;}
.mi-badge.spicy{color:var(–red);border-color:rgba(204,32,32,.3);}
.mi-badge.veg{color:#4caf50;border-color:rgba(76,175,80,.3);}
.mi-price{font-family:‘Playfair Display’,serif;font-size:.95rem;font-weight:700;color:var(–gold);white-space:nowrap;flex-shrink:0;}
.menu-note{font-size:.72rem;font-weight:300;color:var(–mid);font-style:italic;text-align:center;margin-top:14px;}
.suppl-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(200px,1fr));gap:1px;background:var(–border);border:1px solid var(–border);}
.suppl{background:var(–white);padding:12px 18px;display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;}
.suppl-name{font-size:.78rem;font-weight:400;color:var(–ink);}
.suppl-price{font-size:.78rem;color:var(–gold);font-weight:500;}

/* BILIARDO */
#biliardo{padding:100px 40px;background:var(–ink);position:relative;overflow:hidden;}
#biliardo::before{content:’’;position:absolute;inset:0;background:radial-gradient(ellipse at 10% 90%,rgba(200,149,42,.06) 0%,transparent 50%),radial-gradient(ellipse at 90% 10%,rgba(200,149,42,.04) 0%,transparent 40%);}
.bil-inner{max-width:1000px;margin:0 auto;position:relative;z-index:1;}
.bil-header{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:flex-end;margin-bottom:48px;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:20px;}
.bil-eyebrow{font-size:.58rem;font-weight:500;letter-spacing:.22em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(–gold);margin-bottom:10px;}
.bil-title{font-family:‘Playfair Display’,serif;font-size:clamp(2rem,5vw,3.5rem);font-weight:700;color:var(–white);}
.bil-title em{font-style:italic;font-weight:400;color:var(–gold);}
.bil-sub{font-size:.85rem;font-weight:300;color:rgba(255,255,255,.3);max-width:260px;line-height:1.65;text-align:right;}
.bil-cards{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:1px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.06);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.06);}
@media(max-width:700px){.bil-cards{grid-template-columns:1fr}}
.bc{background:var(–ink);padding:40px 32px;transition:background .25s;}
.bc:hover{background:#201c16;}
.bc-icon{font-size:1.8rem;margin-bottom:14px;}
.bc-title{font-family:‘Playfair Display’,serif;font-size:1.2rem;font-style:italic;color:var(–white);margin-bottom:8px;}
.bc-body{font-size:.84rem;font-weight:300;color:rgba(255,255,255,.28);line-height:1.7;}
.bc-badge{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;margin-top:14px;font-size:.52rem;font-weight:500;letter-spacing:.12em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(–gold);border:1px solid rgba(200,149,42,.22);padding:4px 10px;}

/* SPORT */
#sport{padding:80px 40px;background:var(–red);text-align:center;position:relative;overflow:hidden;}
#sport::before{content:’’;position:absolute;inset:0;background:repeating-linear-gradient(45deg,transparent,transparent 20px,rgba(0,0,0,.04) 20px,rgba(0,0,0,.04) 21px);}
.sport-inner{position:relative;z-index:1;}
.sport-live{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;font-size:.58rem;font-weight:500;letter-spacing:.18em;text-transform:uppercase;color:rgba(255,255,255,.55);margin-bottom:14px;}
.live-dot{width:6px;height:6px;border-radius:50%;background:#fff;animation:blink 1.2s infinite;}
@keyframes blink{0%,100%{opacity:.3}50%{opacity:1}}
.sport-title{font-family:‘Playfair Display’,serif;font-size:clamp(2.5rem,7vw,5.5rem);font-weight:700;color:#fff;line-height:.92;}
.sport-title em{font-style:italic;font-weight:400;}
.sport-sub{font-size:.88rem;font-weight:300;color:rgba(255,255,255,.5);margin-top:12px;max-width:420px;margin-left:auto;margin-right:auto;line-height:1.7;}
.sport-icons{display:flex;justify-content:center;gap:36px;margin-top:28px;flex-wrap:wrap;}
.si-item{font-size:.62rem;font-weight:400;letter-spacing:.1em;text-transform:uppercase;color:rgba(255,255,255,.35);display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:6px;}
.si-icon{font-size:1.6rem;}

/* CTA */
#prenota{padding:100px 40px;background:var(–bg2);border-top:1px solid var(–border);text-align:center;}
.cta-inner{max-width:520px;margin:0 auto;}
.cta-logo{width:80px;margin:0 auto 22px;}
.cta-title{font-family:‘Playfair Display’,serif;font-size:clamp(2rem,5vw,3.5rem);font-weight:700;color:var(–ink);margin-bottom:12px;}
.cta-title em{font-style:italic;font-weight:400;}
.cta-sub{font-size:.88rem;font-weight:300;color:var(–mid);line-height:1.75;margin-bottom:28px;}
.cta-sub strong{color:var(–ink);font-weight:400;}
.cta-number{font-family:‘Playfair Display’,serif;font-size:clamp(1.5rem,4vw,2.5rem);font-weight:700;font-style:italic;color:var(–ink);margin-bottom:18px;}
.cta-btn{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;background:var(–ink);color:var(–white);padding:16px 40px;font-size:.7rem;font-weight:500;letter-spacing:.16em;text-transform:uppercase;text-decoration:none;transition:background .2s,transform .2s;}
.cta-btn:hover{background:var(–brown);transform:translateY(-2px);}
.cta-detail{font-size:.6rem;font-weight:300;color:var(–mid);margin-top:14px;letter-spacing:.1em;}

footer{padding:20px 40px;background:var(–ink);display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:10px;border-top:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.06);}
.fl{font-family:‘Playfair Display’,serif;font-style:italic;font-size:.9rem;color:rgba(255,255,255,.22);}
.fc{font-size:.56rem;font-weight:300;color:rgba(255,255,255,.12);letter-spacing:.08em;}

.rv{opacity:0;transform:translateY(22px);transition:opacity .85s cubic-bezier(.16,1,.3,1),transform .85s cubic-bezier(.16,1,.3,1);}
.rv-l{opacity:0;transform:translateX(-22px);transition:opacity .85s cubic-bezier(.16,1,.3,1),transform .85s cubic-bezier(.16,1,.3,1);}
.rv.on,.rv-l.on{opacity:1;transform:none;}
@keyframes up{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(18px)}to{opacity:1;transform:none}}
@keyframes fadeIn{from{opacity:0}to{opacity:1}}
@media(max-width:600px){nav{padding:0 20px;}#menu,#biliardo,#sport,#prenota{padding:80px 24px;}.tabs .tab{padding:11px 10px;font-size:.56rem;min-width:80px;}}
</style>

</head>
<body>

<nav>
  <a href="#" class="n-logo">
    <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Al City"/>
    <span class="n-logo-text">al City</span>
  </a>
  <div class="n-links">
    <a href="#menu" class="n-link">Menù</a>
    <a href="#biliardo" class="n-link">Biliardo</a>
    <a href="#sport" class="n-link">Live Sport</a>
    <a href="#prenota" class="n-link">Prenota</a>
  </div>
  <a href="tel:+41919402537" class="n-cta">Prenota →</a>
</nav>

<section id="hero">
  <div class="hero-content">
    <div class="hero-left">
      <div class="h-eyebrow">🇨🇭 Davesco-Soragno</div>
      <h1 class="h-title">al<br/><em>City.</em></h1>
      <p class="h-tagline">Mangia bene, gioca a biliardo, <strong>guarda la partita.</strong> Tutto in un posto solo.</p>
      <div class="h-pills">
        <div class="pill">🍕 Pizzeria</div>
        <div class="pill">🍔 Hamburger</div>
        <div class="pill">🎱 Biliardo</div>
        <div class="pill">📺 Live Sport</div>
      </div>
      <a href="tel:+41919402537" class="h-btn">📞 Prenota un tavolo</a>
    </div>
    <div class="hero-right">
      <div class="logo-wrap">
        <div class="logo-ring"></div>
        <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Al City"/>
      </div>
      <div class="hero-stats">
        <div class="hs"><div class="hs-n">50+</div><div class="hs-l">Pizze</div></div>
        <div class="hs"><div class="hs-n">🎱</div><div class="hs-l">Biliardo</div></div>
        <div class="hs"><div class="hs-n">Live</div><div class="hs-l">Sport</div></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<div class="strip">
  <div class="strip-track">
    <span class="sw">al City</span><span class="ss">◆</span>
    <span class="sw">Davesco-Soragno</span><span class="ss">◆</span>
    <span class="sw">Pizzeria</span><span class="ss">◆</span>
    <span class="sw">Hamburger</span><span class="ss">◆</span>
    <span class="sw">Biliardo</span><span class="ss">◆</span>
    <span class="sw">Live Sport</span><span class="ss">◆</span>
    <span class="sw">alcity.ch</span><span class="ss">◆</span>
    <span class="sw">al City</span><span class="ss">◆</span>
    <span class="sw">Davesco-Soragno</span><span class="ss">◆</span>
    <span class="sw">Pizzeria</span><span class="ss">◆</span>
    <span class="sw">Hamburger</span><span class="ss">◆</span>
    <span class="sw">Biliardo</span><span class="ss">◆</span>
    <span class="sw">Live Sport</span><span class="ss">◆</span>
    <span class="sw">alcity.ch</span><span class="ss">◆</span>
  </div>
</div>

<section id="menu">
  <div class="menu-inner">
    <div class="menu-header rv">
      <div class="menu-eyebrow">Il nostro menù</div>
      <h2 class="menu-title">Cosa ordiniamo <em>stasera?</em></h2>
      <p class="menu-sub">Scegli la categoria e scopri tutti i nostri piatti · Prezzi in CHF</p>
    </div>

```
<div class="tabs rv">
  <button class="tab active" onclick="showTab('specialita',this)">⭐ Specialità</button>
  <button class="tab" onclick="showTab('pizze',this)">🍕 Pizze</button>
  <button class="tab" onclick="showTab('antipasti',this)">🥗 Antipasti</button>
  <button class="tab" onclick="showTab('primi',this)">🍝 Primi</button>
  <button class="tab" onclick="showTab('dessert',this)">🍮 Dessert</button>
</div>

<!-- SPECIALITÀ -->
<div class="panel active" id="tab-specialita">
  <div class="menu-section">
    <div class="section-label">Le nostre specialità</div>
    <div class="menu-grid">
      <div class="mi"><div><div class="mi-name">Pollo al Cestello City</div><div class="mi-desc">½ Pollo al forno con salsa City, cestello di pane e patatine fritte</div><div class="mi-badge">⭐ Signature</div></div><div class="mi-price">24.50</div></div>
      <div class="mi"><div><div class="mi-name">City Smash</div><div class="mi-desc">Doppio patty di manzo, American cheese, insalata, pomodoro, cipolla caramellata, salsa City</div><div class="mi-badge">🏆 Best seller</div></div><div class="mi-price">30.50</div></div>
      <div class="mi"><div><div class="mi-name">Maxi Hamburger</div><div class="mi-desc">200g carne svizzera, pane sfornato, cipolle brasate, pomodoro, formaggio, cetriolini, uovo, salsa rosa, patatine fritte</div></div><div class="mi-price">29.00</div></div>
      <div class="mi"><div><div class="mi-name">Maxi Hamburger USA</div><div class="mi-desc">200g carne svizzera, cheddar, speck, insalata, pomodori, salsa rosa, patatine fritte</div></div><div class="mi-price">29.00</div></div>
      <div class="mi"><div><div class="mi-name">Tartare di Manzo</div><div class="mi-desc">200g servita con panfocaccia (piccola 100g: 26.00)</div><div class="mi-badge">🥩 Gourmet</div></div><div class="mi-price">31.00</div></div>
      <div class="mi"><div><div class="mi-name">Orecchia d'Elefante</div><div class="mi-desc">Contorno a scelta: patatine fritte, riso o verdure alla griglia</div></div><div class="mi-price">27.50</div></div>
      <div class="mi"><div><div class="mi-name">Orecchia d'Elefante Vegi</div><div class="mi-desc">Melanzana marinata alla birra e spezie, panatura croccante al mais, patate country e senape al miele</div><div class="mi-badge veg">🌿 Vegetariano</div></div><div class="mi-price">24.50</div></div>
      <div class="mi"><div><div class="mi-name">Cordon Bleu Gigante</div><div class="mi-desc">Contorno a scelta: patatine fritte, riso o verdure alla griglia (normale: 29.00)</div></div><div class="mi-price">35.00</div></div>
      <div class="mi"><div><div class="mi-name">Hamburger Vegano</div><div class="mi-desc">130g con insalata (+patatine fritte 3.00)</div><div class="mi-badge veg">🌿 Vegano</div></div><div class="mi-price">23.00</div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="menu-section">
    <div class="section-label">Dalla griglia</div>
    <div class="menu-grid">
      <div class="mi"><div><div class="mi-name">Carne alla Pioda</div><div class="mi-desc">Min. 2 persone · 3 tipi di carne (70g cad.) a scelta, 3 salse fatte in casa, patatine fritte</div><div class="mi-badge">👥 Per 2+</div></div><div class="mi-price">38.50</div></div>
      <div class="mi"><div><div class="mi-name">Ribeye</div><div class="mi-desc">250g manzo alla griglia con Café de Paris, contorno a scelta</div><div class="mi-badge">🥩 Premium</div></div><div class="mi-price">38.50</div></div>
      <div class="mi"><div><div class="mi-name">Le Nostre Mitiche Puntine</div><div class="mi-desc">500g con contorno — venerdì e sabato sera, 30 min. attesa</div><div class="mi-badge">📅 Ven/Sab</div></div><div class="mi-price">32.50</div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- PIZZE -->
<div class="panel" id="tab-pizze">
  <div class="menu-section">
    <div class="section-label">Pizze classiche</div>
    <div class="menu-grid">
      <div class="mi"><div><div class="mi-name">Marinara</div><div class="mi-desc">Pomodoro, aglio, origano, basilico, olio d'oliva</div></div><div class="mi-price">11.50</div></div>
      <div class="mi"><div><div class="mi-name">Margherita</div><div class="mi-desc">Pomodoro, mozzarella, basilico</div></div><div class="mi-price">13.50</div></div>
      <div class="mi"><div><div class="mi-name">Margherita City</div><div class="mi-desc">Pomodoro, mozzarella, basilico, impasto germogli</div><div class="mi-badge">⭐ Signature</div></div><div class="mi-price">16.00</div></div>
      <div class="mi"><div><div class="mi-name">Siciliana</div><div class="mi-desc">Pomodoro, acciughe, capperi, olive, origano, basilico, olio d'oliva</div></div><div class="mi-price">15.00</div></div>
      <div class="mi"><div><div class="mi-name">Napoli</div><div class="mi-desc">Pomodoro, mozzarella, acciughe, origano, basilico</div></div><div class="mi-price">15.50</div></div>
      <div class="mi"><div><div class="mi-name">Prosciutto</div><div class="mi-desc">Pomodoro, mozzarella, prosciutto cotto</div></div><div class="mi-price">17.00</div></div>
      <div class="mi"><div><div class="mi-name">Salame</div><div class="mi-desc">Pomodoro, mozzarella, salame</div></div><div class="mi-price">17.00</div></div>
      <div class="mi"><div><div class="mi-name">Diavola</div><div class="mi-desc">Pomodoro, mozzarella, salame piccante</div><div class="mi-badge spicy">🌶️ Piccante</div></div><div class="mi-price">17.00</div></div>
      <div class="mi"><div><div class="mi-name">Pugliese</div><div class="mi-desc">Pomodoro, mozzarella, cipolle, olive, basilico</div></div><div class="mi-price">16.00</div></div>
      <div class="mi"><div><div class="mi-name">Al Tonno</div><div class="mi-desc">Pomodoro, mozzarella, tonno (con cipolle: 18.00)</div></div><div class="mi-price">17.00</div></div>
      <div class="mi"><div><div class="mi-name">Gorgonzola</div><div class="mi-desc">Pomodoro, mozzarella, gorgonzola</div></div><div class="mi-price">17.00</div></div>
      <div class="mi"><div><div class="mi-name">Gorgonzola City</div><div class="mi-desc">Pomodoro, mozzarella, gorgonzola, impasto germogli</div></div><div class="mi-price">19.50</div></div>
      <div class="mi"><div><div class="mi-name">Wurstel</div><div class="mi-desc">Pomodoro, mozzarella, wurstel</div></div><div class="mi-price">17.00</div></div>
      <div class="mi"><div><div class="mi-name">Prosciutto e Funghi</div><div class="mi-desc">Pomodoro, mozzarella, prosciutto cotto, funghi saltati in padella</div></div><div class="mi-price">18.00</div></div>
      <div class="mi"><div><div class="mi-name">Prosciutto e Zola</div><div class="mi-desc">Pomodoro, mozzarella, prosciutto cotto, gorgonzola</div></div><div class="mi-price">18.00</div></div>
      <div class="mi"><div><div class="mi-name">Rucola e Mascarpone</div><div class="mi-desc">Pomodoro, mozzarella, rucola, mascarpone</div></div><div class="mi-price">18.00</div></div>
      <div class="mi"><div><div class="mi-name">Bufalo Bill</div><div class="mi-desc">Pomodoro, mozzarella di bufala, basilico, olio d'oliva</div></div><div class="mi-price">18.00</div></div>
      <div class="mi"><div><div class="mi-name">Quattro Stagioni</div><div class="mi-desc">Pomodoro, mozzarella, prosciutto cotto, funghi, carciofi, olive</div></div><div class="mi-price">19.00</div></div>
      <div class="mi"><div><div class="mi-name">Capricciosa</div><div class="mi-desc">Pomodoro, mozzarella, prosciutto cotto, funghi, peperoni, capperi, carciofi</div></div><div class="mi-price">19.00</div></div>
      <div class="mi"><div><div class="mi-name">Quattro Formaggi</div><div class="mi-desc">Pomodoro, mozzarella, gorgonzola, fontina, parmigiano</div></div><div class="mi-price">19.00</div></div>
      <div class="mi"><div><div class="mi-name">Vegetariana</div><div class="mi-desc">Pomodoro, mozzarella, melanzane, zucchine, spinaci, peperoni</div><div class="mi-badge veg">🌿 Veg</div></div><div class="mi-price">19.00</div></div>
      <div class="mi"><div><div class="mi-name">Street</div><div class="mi-desc">Pomodoro, mozzarella, salame piccante, mascarpone</div><div class="mi-badge spicy">🌶️ Piccante</div></div><div class="mi-price">19.00</div></div>
      <div class="mi"><div><div class="mi-name">Dani</div><div class="mi-desc">Mozzarella, salsiccia, provola, funghi</div></div><div class="mi-price">19.00</div></div>
      <div class="mi"><div><div class="mi-name">Gustosa</div><div class="mi-desc">Pomodoro, mozzarella, salame piccante, zola</div><div class="mi-badge spicy">🌶️ Piccante</div></div><div class="mi-price">19.00</div></div>
      <div class="mi"><div><div class="mi-name">Calzone</div><div class="mi-desc">Pomodoro, mozzarella, prosciutto, funghi, grana, basilico, olio d'oliva</div></div><div class="mi-price">19.00</div></div>
      <div class="mi"><div><div class="mi-name">Al Crudo</div><div class="mi-desc">Pomodoro, mozzarella, prosciutto crudo</div></div><div class="mi-price">19.50</div></div>
      <div class="mi"><div><div class="mi-name">Carbonara</div><div class="mi-desc">Pomodoro, mozzarella, speck, uovo</div></div><div class="mi-price">19.50</div></div>
      <div class="mi"><div><div class="mi-name">Estiva</div><div class="mi-desc">Pomodoro, bresaola, Philadelphia, rucola, pomodorini</div></div><div class="mi-price">20.00</div></div>
      <div class="mi"><div><div class="mi-name">Paoletta</div><div class="mi-desc">Pomodoro, mozzarella, prosciutto crudo, gorgonzola</div></div><div class="mi-price">20.00</div></div>
      <div class="mi"><div><div class="mi-name">Tirolese</div><div class="mi-desc">Pomodoro, mozzarella, speck, grana, cipolle, origano</div></div><div class="mi-price">20.50</div></div>
      <div class="mi"><div><div class="mi-name">La Prelibata</div><div class="mi-desc">Pomodoro, mozzarella, salsiccia, zola, nduja, cipolle caramellate</div><div class="mi-badge spicy">🌶️ Piccante</div></div><div class="mi-price">20.50</div></div>
      <div class="mi"><div><div class="mi-name">Bufalo Bill City</div><div class="mi-desc">Pomodoro, mozzarella di bufala, basilico, olio d'oliva, impasto germogli</div></div><div class="mi-price">21.00</div></div>
      <div class="mi"><div><div class="mi-name">Tropea</div><div class="mi-desc">Base margherita, stracciatella, pomodorini, cipolla di Tropea</div></div><div class="mi-price">21.50</div></div>
      <div class="mi"><div><div class="mi-name">Dell'Ultrà</div><div class="mi-desc">Pomodoro, mozzarella, salame piccante, cipolla caramellata, pesto, burrata</div><div class="mi-badge spicy">🌶️ Piccante</div></div><div class="mi-price">21.50</div></div>
      <div class="mi"><div><div class="mi-name">USA</div><div class="mi-desc">Pomodoro, mozzarella, patatine fritte, wurstel, pancetta, salsa rosa</div></div><div class="mi-price">21.50</div></div>
      <div class="mi"><div><div class="mi-name">Inferno</div><div class="mi-desc">Pomodoro, mozzarella, salame piccante, tabasco, salsiccia, nduja, aglio, peperoncino, cipolle</div><div class="mi-badge spicy">🔥 Molto piccante</div></div><div class="mi-price">22.00</div></div>
      <div class="mi"><div><div class="mi-name">Burger Pizza</div><div class="mi-desc">Mozzarella, macinato di manzo, cipolla caramellata, cheddar, pancetta, salsa rosa</div></div><div class="mi-price">22.50</div></div>
      <div class="mi"><div><div class="mi-name">Valtellina</div><div class="mi-desc">Pomodoro, mozzarella, bresaola, rucola, grana</div></div><div class="mi-price">22.50</div></div>
      <div class="mi"><div><div class="mi-name">Gioia</div><div class="mi-desc">Mozzarella, prosciutto crudo, rucola, mascarpone, olio tartufato</div></div><div class="mi-price">22.50</div></div>
      <div class="mi"><div><div class="mi-name">Goal</div><div class="mi-desc">Mozzarella, ¼ prosciutto crudo, ¼ cotto, ¼ salame piccante, ¼ bresaola</div></div><div class="mi-price">17.50</div></div>
      <div class="mi"><div><div class="mi-name">Kebab</div><div class="mi-desc">Pomodoro, mozzarella, carne kebab, cipolla saltata, pomodoro fresco, salsa rosa</div></div><div class="mi-price">20.00</div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="menu-section">
    <div class="section-label">Pizze Gourmet</div>
    <div class="menu-grid">
      <div class="mi"><div><div class="mi-name">La Pistacchiosa</div><div class="mi-desc">Crema di pistacchio, mozzarella, mortadella, burrata, granella di pistacchio</div><div class="mi-badge">🍀 Gourmet</div></div><div class="mi-price">25.00</div></div>
      <div class="mi"><div><div class="mi-name">Del Pizzaiolo</div><div class="mi-desc">Pomodoro, tartare, pomodorini, rucola, scaglie di grana</div><div class="mi-badge">🍀 Gourmet</div></div><div class="mi-price">25.00</div></div>
      <div class="mi"><div><div class="mi-name">Pizza Rollè</div><div class="mi-desc">Mozzarella, rucola, prosciutto crudo, scaglie di grana, pomodorini, glassa balsamica</div><div class="mi-badge">🍀 Gourmet</div></div><div class="mi-price">26.00</div></div>
      <div class="mi"><div><div class="mi-name">Carpaccio</div><div class="mi-desc">Pomodoro, mozzarella, rucola, carpaccio di manzo, scaglie di grana, pomodorini</div><div class="mi-badge">🍀 Gourmet</div></div><div class="mi-price">26.00</div></div>
      <div class="mi"><div><div class="mi-name">Pizza Roast-Beef</div><div class="mi-desc">Mozzarella, roast-beef, patate prezzemolate, salsa tartara</div><div class="mi-badge">🍀 Gourmet</div></div><div class="mi-price">26.00</div></div>
      <div class="mi"><div><div class="mi-name">Pizza Gigante 50cm</div><div class="mi-desc">Fino a 3 gusti a piacere — ideale per il tavolo!</div><div class="mi-badge">👥 Da condividere</div></div><div class="mi-price">45.00</div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="menu-section">
    <div class="section-label">Supplementi pizza</div>
    <div class="suppl-grid">
      <div class="suppl"><div class="suppl-name">Olive, rucola, capperi</div><div class="suppl-price">+1.00</div></div>
      <div class="suppl"><div class="suppl-name">P. cotto, uovo, funghi, acciughe, cipolle, doppia mozzarella, scaglie di grana, tonno, melanzane, speck, zucchine, gorgonzola, peperoni, spinaci, mascarpone, carciofi, salame piccante, mozzarella di bufala, impasto germogli</div><div class="suppl-price">+2.00</div></div>
      <div class="suppl"><div class="suppl-name">Prosciutto crudo, bresaola</div><div class="suppl-price">+5.00</div></div>
      <div class="suppl"><div class="suppl-name">Senza glutine (solo intolleranti, non allergici)</div><div class="suppl-price">+3.00</div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <p class="menu-note">Impasto a lunga lievitazione · Disponibile anche senza glutine su richiesta</p>
</div>

<!-- ANTIPASTI -->
<div class="panel" id="tab-antipasti">
  <div class="menu-section">
    <div class="section-label">Antipasti & Snack</div>
    <div class="menu-grid">
      <div class="mi"><div><div class="mi-name">Affettati Misti con Gnocco Fritto</div><div class="mi-desc">Selezione di salumi e formaggi con gnocco fritto</div></div><div class="mi-price">25.00</div></div>
      <div class="mi"><div><div class="mi-name">Alette di Pollo</div><div class="mi-desc">Con patatine fritte</div></div><div class="mi-price">15.50</div></div>
      <div class="mi"><div><div class="mi-name">Chicken Nuggets</div><div class="mi-desc">Con patatine fritte</div></div><div class="mi-price">14.50</div></div>
      <div class="mi"><div><div class="mi-name">Patatine Fritte</div><div class="mi-desc">Classiche o country</div></div><div class="mi-price">9.50</div></div>
      <div class="mi"><div><div class="mi-name">Piadina/Focaccia City</div><div class="mi-desc">Prosciutto cotto, mozzarella, salsa rosa, pomodoro, insalata</div></div><div class="mi-price">10.50</div></div>
      <div class="mi"><div><div class="mi-name">Piadina/Focaccia Crudo</div><div class="mi-desc">Prosciutto crudo, mozzarella, salsa rosa</div></div><div class="mi-price">12.00</div></div>
      <div class="mi"><div><div class="mi-name">Piadina/Focaccia Classica</div><div class="mi-desc">Prosciutto cotto, mozzarella, salsa rosa</div></div><div class="mi-price">9.00</div></div>
      <div class="mi"><div><div class="mi-name">Tomino alla Griglia</div><div class="mi-desc">Con verdure grigliate</div></div><div class="mi-price">18.00</div></div>
      <div class="mi"><div><div class="mi-name">Focaccia Gourmet</div><div class="mi-desc">Mortadella, burrata e crema di pistacchio</div><div class="mi-badge">🍀 Gourmet</div></div><div class="mi-price">17.50</div></div>
      <div class="mi"><div><div class="mi-name">Grande Fritto Misto</div><div class="mi-desc">Anelli di cipolla, jalapeños bomb, mini involtini primavera, salsa agrodolce</div></div><div class="mi-price">18.50</div></div>
      <div class="mi"><div><div class="mi-name">Nachos Estivi</div><div class="mi-desc">Con brunoise di pomodoro, guacamole e panna acida</div></div><div class="mi-price">16.50</div></div>
      <div class="mi"><div><div class="mi-name">Nachos con Formaggio</div><div class="mi-desc">Nachos con salsa al formaggio fuso</div></div><div class="mi-price">13.00</div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="menu-section">
    <div class="section-label">Insalate & Piatti Freschi</div>
    <div class="menu-grid">
      <div class="mi"><div><div class="mi-name">Insalata Snooker</div><div class="mi-desc">Insalata verde, verdure, formaggio, uovo, tonno, mais, servita nel cestello di pane</div><div class="mi-badge">🎱 Special</div></div><div class="mi-price">16.50</div></div>
      <div class="mi"><div><div class="mi-name">Insalata City</div><div class="mi-desc">Insalata verde, cetrioli, mais, pomodori, carote (con cestello di pane: 14.00)</div></div><div class="mi-price">12.50</div></div>
      <div class="mi"><div><div class="mi-name">Caesar Salad</div><div class="mi-desc">Insalata mista, pollo fritto, grana padano, pane croccante, salsa ranch</div></div><div class="mi-price">21.00</div></div>
      <div class="mi"><div><div class="mi-name">Insalata Caprese</div><div class="mi-desc">Mozzarella di bufala, pomodori, basilico fresco</div></div><div class="mi-price">17.50</div></div>
      <div class="mi"><div><div class="mi-name">Insalata Verde</div><div class="mi-desc">Insalata verde fresca</div></div><div class="mi-price">9.50</div></div>
      <div class="mi"><div><div class="mi-name">Carpaccio di Bresaola</div><div class="mi-desc">Con pomodorini cherry, scaglie di grana e rucola</div></div><div class="mi-price">22.50</div></div>
      <div class="mi"><div><div class="mi-name">Roast-Beef con Salsa Tartare</div><div class="mi-desc">Roast-beef affettato con salsa tartare artigianale</div></div><div class="mi-price">30.50</div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- PRIMI -->
<div class="panel" id="tab-primi">
  <div class="menu-section">
    <div class="section-label">I Primi</div>
    <div class="menu-grid">
      <div class="mi"><div><div class="mi-name">Spaghetti con Pomodorini e Burrata</div><div class="mi-desc">To share, nel pentolone</div><div class="mi-badge">👥 Da condividere</div></div><div class="mi-price">19.50</div></div>
      <div class="mi"><div><div class="mi-name">Spaghetti alla Carbonara</div><div class="mi-desc">Prezzo per persona</div></div><div class="mi-price">19.00/pp</div></div>
      <div class="mi"><div><div class="mi-name">Bucatini all'Amatriciana</div><div class="mi-desc">Con guanciale e pecorino romano · Prezzo per persona</div></div><div class="mi-price">19.00/pp</div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- DESSERT -->
<div class="panel" id="tab-dessert">
  <div class="menu-section">
    <div class="section-label">Dessert</div>
    <div class="menu-grid">
      <div class="mi"><div><div class="mi-name">Tiramisù della Casa</div><div class="mi-desc">Ricetta artigianale del nostro chef</div><div class="mi-badge">⭐ Signature</div></div><div class="mi-price">9.50</div></div>
      <div class="mi"><div><div class="mi-name">Tortino Caldo</div><div class="mi-desc">Al cioccolato fondente con gelato</div></div><div class="mi-price">10.50</div></div>
      <div class="mi"><div><div class="mi-name">Pizza Nutella</div><div class="mi-desc">Consigliata per 2 persone · Aggiungi ingrediente a scelta +2.00: smarties, scaglie di cacao, granella nocciola, granella pistacchio, panna montata</div><div class="mi-badge">👥 Per 2</div></div><div class="mi-price">14.00</div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```

  </div>
</section>

<!-- BILIARDO -->

<section id="biliardo">
  <div class="bil-inner">
    <div class="bil-header">
      <div class="rv-l">
        <div class="bil-eyebrow">Nel locale</div>
        <h2 class="bil-title">Biliardo <em>sempre</em><br/>disponibile.</h2>
      </div>
      <p class="bil-sub rv">Tavoli professionali disponibili durante tutto l'orario di apertura.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="bil-cards">
      <div class="bc rv">
        <div class="bc-icon">🎱</div>
        <div class="bc-title">Biliardo Normale</div>
        <div class="bc-body">Tavolo classico, ideale per una partita tra amici. Disponibile durante tutto l'orario di apertura.</div>
        <div style="margin-top:16px;display:flex;align-items:baseline;gap:8px;">
          <span style="font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:2rem;font-style:italic;color:var(--gold);">16</span>
          <span style="font-size:.7rem;font-weight:300;color:rgba(255,255,255,.3);letter-spacing:.1em;text-transform:uppercase;">CHF / ora</span>
        </div>
        <div class="bc-badge">Si ordina alla cassa</div>
      </div>
      <div class="bc rv">
        <div class="bc-icon">🎯</div>
        <div class="bc-title">Biliardo Professionale</div>
        <div class="bc-body">Buche più piccole, panno di qualità superiore. Per chi vuole un'esperienza di gioco più tecnica e precisa.</div>
        <div style="margin-top:16px;display:flex;align-items:baseline;gap:8px;">
          <span style="font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:2rem;font-style:italic;color:var(--gold);">16</span>
          <span style="font-size:.7rem;font-weight:300;color:rgba(255,255,255,.3);letter-spacing:.1em;text-transform:uppercase;">CHF / ora</span>
        </div>
        <div class="bc-badge">Si ordina alla cassa</div>
      </div>
      <div class="bc rv">
        <div class="bc-icon">🤝</div>
        <div class="bc-title">Serata con gli amici</div>
        <div class="bc-body">Abbina una cena e una partita a biliardo — il modo migliore per passare la serata all'Al City.</div>
        <div class="bc-badge" style="margin-top:28px;">Prenota al +41 91 940 25 37</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- SPORT -->

<section id="sport">
  <div class="sport-inner rv">
    <div class="sport-live"><div class="live-dot"></div>Live ogni settimana</div>
    <h2 class="sport-title">Tutte le partite, <em>in diretta.</em></h2>
    <p class="sport-sub">Calcio, Formula 1, basket e tutti i grandi eventi internazionali. Da noi non ti perdi nemmeno un minuto — prenota il tuo tavolo per le serate più importanti.</p>
    <div class="sport-icons">
      <div class="si-item"><div class="si-icon">⚽</div>Calcio</div>
      <div class="si-item"><div class="si-icon">🏎️</div>Formula 1</div>
      <div class="si-item"><div class="si-icon">🏀</div>Basket</div>
      <div class="si-item"><div class="si-icon">🏆</div>Grandi eventi</div>
    </div>
    <div style="margin-top:40px;padding-top:32px;border-top:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.15);">
      <p style="font-size:.65rem;font-weight:500;letter-spacing:.18em;text-transform:uppercase;color:rgba(255,255,255,.4);margin-bottom:14px;">Seguici sui social</p>
      <a href="https://alcity.ch" target="_blank" style="display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.1);color:#fff;padding:13px 28px;text-decoration:none;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.2);font-size:.72rem;font-weight:500;letter-spacing:.12em;text-transform:uppercase;transition:background .2s;" onmouseover="this.style.background='rgba(255,255,255,.18)'" onmouseout="this.style.background='rgba(255,255,255,.1)'">
        <svg width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor"><path d="M12 2.163c3.204 0 3.584.012 4.85.07 3.252.148 4.771 1.691 4.919 4.919.058 1.265.069 1.645.069 4.849 0 3.205-.012 3.584-.069 4.849-.149 3.225-1.664 4.771-4.919 4.919-1.266.058-1.644.07-4.85.07-3.204 0-3.584-.012-4.849-.07-3.26-.149-4.771-1.699-4.919-4.92-.058-1.265-.07-1.644-.07-4.849 0-3.204.013-3.583.07-4.849.149-3.227 1.664-4.771 4.919-4.919 1.266-.057 1.645-.069 4.849-.069zm0-2.163c-3.259 0-3.667.014-4.947.072-4.358.2-6.78 2.618-6.98 6.98-.059 1.281-.073 1.689-.073 4.948 0 3.259.014 3.668.072 4.948.2 4.358 2.618 6.78 6.98 6.98 1.281.058 1.689.072 4.948.072 3.259 0 3.668-.014 4.948-.072 4.354-.2 6.782-2.618 6.979-6.98.059-1.28.073-1.689.073-4.948 0-3.259-.014-3.667-.072-4.947-.196-4.354-2.617-6.78-6.979-6.98-1.281-.059-1.69-.073-4.949-.073zm0 5.838c-3.403 0-6.162 2.759-6.162 6.162s2.759 6.163 6.162 6.163 6.162-2.759 6.162-6.163c0-3.403-2.759-6.162-6.162-6.162zm0 10.162c-2.209 0-4-1.79-4-4 0-2.209 1.791-4 4-4s4 1.791 4 4c0 2.21-1.791 4-4 4zm6.406-11.845c-.796 0-1.441.645-1.441 1.44s.645 1.44 1.441 1.44c.795 0 1.439-.645 1.439-1.44s-.644-1.44-1.439-1.44z"/></svg>
        @alcity.ch
      </a>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- CTA -->

<section id="prenota">
  <div class="cta-inner">
    <img class="cta-logo rv" src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Al City"/>
    <h2 class="cta-title rv">Ti aspettiamo <em>stasera.</em></h2>
    <p class="cta-sub rv">Chiama i tuoi amici e <strong>prenota il tuo tavolo.</strong></p>
    <div class="cta-number rv">+41 91 940 25 37</div>
    <a href="tel:+41919402537" class="cta-btn rv">📞 Chiama e prenota</a>
    <p class="cta-detail rv">Al City · Davesco-Soragno · alcity.ch</p>
  </div>
</section>

<footer>
  <span class="fl">al City</span>
  <span class="fc">Davesco-Soragno · +41 91 940 25 37 · alcity.ch</span>
</footer>

<script>
function showTab(name, btn) {
  document.querySelectorAll('.panel').forEach(p => p.classList.remove('active'));
  document.querySelectorAll('.tab').forEach(t => t.classList.remove('active'));
  document.getElementById('tab-' + name).classList.add('active');
  btn.classList.add('active');
}
const rvs = document.querySelectorAll('.rv,.rv-l');
document.querySelectorAll('.bc,.mi').forEach((el,i) => { el.style.transitionDelay = (i * .04) + 's'; });
const obs = new IntersectionObserver(e => { e.forEach(x => { if(x.isIntersecting) x.target.classList.add('on'); }); }, {threshold: 0.05});
rvs.forEach(el => obs.observe(el));
</script>

</body>
</html>
